description: Compare Quantum Reservoir Computing (QRC) vs Classic Reservoir Computing (Echo State Network) for stock price prediction on DOW 10 stocks

inputs.data_source: yfinance DOW 10 (AAPL, MSFT, JPM, JNJ, V, PG, UNH, HD, CVX, KO)

quantum_method: Quantum Reservoir Computing with cqlib StatevectorSimulator
success_signals: QRC parameter efficiency > 90% vs Classic RC
QRC RMSE within 2x of Classic RC on average
QRC outperforms Classic RC on at least 1 stock
